RestorePlanRestoration.description:
One tombstoned artifact scheduled for restoration inside a persisted `rocky restore` plan ([`RestorePlan`]).

Captures the tombstone's full identity — enough to (a) re-locate the exact live tombstone at apply time (the plan is advisory; apply re-resolves against the live custody ledger), and (b) report the restoration to the reviewer. Identity is always the full `(run, model, path, hash)` tuple.

blake3_hash.description: Content hash (hex) of the evicted bytes — the identity the restore re-computes and asserts equality against **before any write**.

commit_version.description: Delta commit version the artifact was attached to, for correlation.

evicted_at.description: When the artifact was evicted (RFC 3339) — with the hash, this is the tombstone's ledger key.

file_path.description: Object-store path the restore re-materializes to (the tombstoned location).

gc_plan_id.description: The `rocky gc` plan that authorized the eviction (custody back-link).

input_hash.description: Input-closure hash captured on the tombstone; `null` when unrecorded.

model_name.description: Model that produced the evicted artifact.

recipe_hash.description: Recipe-identity hash captured on the tombstone; `null` when unrecorded.

run_id.description: Run that produced it — half of the provenance key the restore replays from.

size_bytes.description: Physical size of the evicted artifact in bytes.

description:
JSON output of `rocky restore <target>` (plan mode).

The plan has been written to the plan store; this reports its id and the resolved tombstone(s). Restoration is symmetric-caution gated like gc: the operator must `rocky review <plan-id> --approve` and then `rocky apply <plan-id>` — the plan itself writes nothing.

notes.description: Operator caveats (re-derivation source, hash-exactness gate, no-overwrite rule).

plan_id.description: The persisted plan id — pass to `rocky review` then `rocky apply`.

restoration_count.description: Number of tombstoned artifacts the plan restores.

review_required.description: Always `true`: a restore plan is unconditionally review-gated.

target.description: The user-supplied target the resolution matched.

total_bytes.description: Total tombstoned bytes the plan restores.

title: RestorePlanOutput
